name: tdd-state-machine
summary: Forward-only TDD state machine: tdd-step.py, tdd-context.py, tdd-drift-check.py. Owns these scripts; the originals have been removed from tdd-subagent.
deprecation_criterion: when TDD state machine is replaced by a fundamentally different orchestration approach
spec_no_change_reason: spec already committed in this cycle's spec-update step
